# Lodor — Releases

One index for every Lodor release across the project's repositories. Lodor ships several front-ends from separate repos; this is the single place to find them all.

<!-- LATEST:BEGIN (regenerated by release/publish-lanes.sh — do not edit inside the markers) -->

Devices self-update via the manifest at `https://lodordev.github.io/lodor/versions.json` (ed25519-signed as of 0.9.7.6).

## Where releases live (the map)

- **[lodordev/lodor](https://github.com/lodordev/lodor/releases)** — the umbrella release page: **every** artifact of every release (muOS `.muxapp`, Knulli zip, LodorOS update-overlays, Android APK, NextUI zip, `versions.json` + signature). If it shipped, it's here.
- **[lodordev/lodoros](https://github.com/lodordev/lodoros/releases)** — the LodorOS **full-card** image. New users flash this; updates thereafter come as overlays via in-app "Update Lodor".
- **[lodordev/lodor-muos](https://github.com/lodordev/lodor-muos/releases)** — the muOS `.muxapp`, mirrored per release.
- **[lodordev/lodor-knulli](https://github.com/lodordev/lodor-knulli/releases)** — the Knulli zip, mirrored per release.
- **[lodordev/lodor-nextui](https://github.com/lodordev/lodor-nextui/releases)** — the NextUI Pak Store channel.
- **Android** — the APK ships on the umbrella release page (no separate repo).

## How to install each front-end

- **LodorOS (Miyoo: Mini Plus / A30 / Flip V2):** flash the full-card `LodorOS-<v>.zip` to a **FAT32** card with a real `unzip -o` (keep hidden dot-folders), eject cleanly, boot. Then **Update Lodor** keeps it current; config, saves, and ROMs are preserved.
- **Lodor-muOS (H700 Anbernic):** install the `.muxapp` via the muOS App Downloader or Archive Manager.
- **Lodor-Knulli (RG35XX Flip and other Batocera-family):** extract the zip onto `/userdata`, open Ports → Lodor.
- **Lodor-NextUI (TrimUI):** install the Tool pak from the NextUI Pak Store.
- **Android:** sideload the APK; pair from the in-app setup.

## Full history

### LodorOS full card — lodordev/lodoros
| Version | Notes |
|---|---|
| 0.9.7.6 | Current. Handoff save-state sync, signed updates (warn), reliability fixes. |
| 0.9.7.1–0.9.7.5 | Overlay-only versions (no card cut); see umbrella releases. |
| 0.9.5 and earlier | Superseded. |

### Umbrella (all artifacts) — lodordev/lodor
| Version | Notes |
|---|---|
| 0.9.7.6 | Current. Handoff hardening, signed update manifests (warn mode), Android APK returns. |
| 0.9.7.2–0.9.7.5 | Handoff save-state sync rollout, launch card, updater fixes. |
| 0.9.7 / 0.9.7.1 | Handoff v1, first Android release. |
| 0.9.6 | Four-lane consolidated release. |
